title: Cobblemon Optimized Adds all 1028 Pokemons + Megas + Legendaries
description: Contains all 1028 pokemons as well as LEGENDARIES. We also have mega evolution
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ee0203e42820d36f1feb2f415410ccf08011cb0_0.webp)

#                                    The Adventure Awaits
Experience the ultimate Pokémon journey in Minecraft like never before. Cobblemon Optimized is a lag-free modpack crafted for smooth performance and immersive cobblemon gameplay. This modpack is designed for the Hub server which adds all the pokemons!

Explore a world where you can ride your Pokémon, hear dynamic ambient sounds, and enjoy carefully tuned mods that enhance every aspect of the Cobblemon experience — from battles to biomes. 
Whether you're battling, building, or catching 'em all, this modpack delivers peak performance without sacrificing immersion.

⚡ Lag-Free Performance – Optimized for smooth FPS and server tick rates

🐉 Rideable Pokémon – Travel the world on the back of your favorite Pokémon

🎧 Immersive Ambient Sounds – Lifelike environments with rich soundscapes

🔧 Hand-Picked Mods – Tuned specifically for the Cobblemon experience

🗺️ Exploration Ready – Biome diversity and performance balanced for adventuring

🎮 Plug & Play – Easy to install, seamless multiplayer compatibility

## Jump straight into the action on our Multiplayer Server
Custom Gyms – Challenge unique Gym Leaders and earn badges

💸 GTS System – Trade Pokémon globally with ease

🧬 Custom Pokémon – Discover exclusive Cobblemon variants found only on this server

🤝 Active Community – Friendly, competitive, and always growing

🏠 Player Housing & Claims – Build, decorate, and protect your territory

🔁 Regular Events – From tournaments to seasonal giveaways

### **We recommend Changing the dedicated ram to at least 4 GB**
### 
This modpack is regularly updated to bring you the BEST experience we will always have the latest cobblemon release available.
